## reference · Doherty Threshold
* Provide system feedback within 400 ms to keep users' attention and increase productivity.
* Use perceived performance to improve response time and reduce the perception of waiting.
* Animation can visually engage users while loading or processing happens in the background.
* Progress bars make wait times tolerable, regardless of their accuracy.
* Adding a purposeful delay to a process can increase its perceived value and instill trust.

Sources: https://lawsofux.com/doherty-threshold/
